name: ground_truth_si2_flaw_correction_compliant
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 296, CCI-001227, assessed 2026-05-27). Compliant verdict based on multiple procedural documents including USD-numbered DevSecOps Guide and Software Development Plan. Narrative uses 'Reviewed' and 'confirmed' affirming phrases with multiple document citations. Evidence type: procedural documentation (vulnerability management SOPs, DevSecOps guide). Tests multi-document citation narrative acceptance.

ccis_row.guidance: 001227: The organization corrects information system flaws.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment obtains and examines the information system and ensures the organization being inspected/assessed corrects information system flaws.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Vulnerability Scanning Analysis and Reporting Procedures — defines flaw identification and reporting workflow.
- Vulnerability Tracking and Remediation Procedures — defines flaw correction timeline and tracking.
- USD00011570 DevSecOps Guide — organizational process for flaw remediation in the CI/CD pipeline.
- USD00008630 Software Development Plan — flaw remediation integration into configuration management.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined Vulnerability Scanning Analysis and Reporting Procedures, Vulnerability Tracking SOP, DevSecOps Guide (USD00011570), and Software Development Plan (USD00008630); confirmed via the cited SOPs that a documented process exists to correct identified information system flaws.
